perturbation.original_text: I will not disclose, publish, reproduce or transmit any examination material or content by any means for any reason.
perturbation.changed_text: I will endeavor not to disclose examination material or content to the best of my ability.
perturbation.explanation: Replacing the definitive 'I will not disclose' with the weaker 'I will endeavor not to disclose...to the best of my ability' introduces ambiguity. This suggests that disclosure may be permissible under certain circumstances, directly contradicting the original strict prohibition. The term endeavor introduces a measure of uncertainty.
perturbation.contradicted_text: I will endeavor not to disclose examination material or content to the best of my ability.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated 'I will not disclose,' creating a definitive prohibition. The changed text weakens this to 'I will endeavor not to disclose...to the best of my ability,' introducing ambiguity and suggesting disclosure might be permissible under certain circumstances. The 'endeavor' language introduces uncertainty, directly contradicting the strict prohibition of the original clause. Since the Changed Text and Contradicted Text are the same, and the changed text creates ambiguity in the document, a contradiction exists.

perturbation.original_text: The definitions, requirements, obligations, rights, sanctions, and liabilities created by controlling Executive orders and statutory provisions are incorporated into this agreement and are controlling.
perturbation.changed_text: Relevant Executive orders and statutory provisions may inform the interpretation of this agreement.
perturbation.explanation: By changing 'are incorporated into this agreement and are controlling' to 'may inform the interpretation of this agreement,' the legal force of external regulations is weakened. This creates uncertainty as to which specific external definitions, requirements, etc., actually apply, or how. The original clause gives these regulations legal precedence, but this revised one, weaken that enforceability, creating a contradiction with the original agreement's aim.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Relevant Executive orders and statutory provisions may inform the interpretation of this agreement.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that Executive orders and statutory provisions are 'incorporated into this agreement and are controlling,' giving them legal precedence within the contract. The changed text weakens this by stating that these provisions 'may inform the interpretation of this agreement,' reducing their legal force to merely informative. This directly contradicts the original intent of the agreement. The contradicted text repeats the language of the Changed Text, demonstrating that the weakened language directly contradicts the originally intended precedence as outlined by the explanation given. Therefore, there is an in-text contradiction according to the definition for Omissions - In Text Contradiction.
